text:
I get message on console:
Fatal double fault:
eip - 0xc0ab55e8
esp = 0xc7322000
ebp = 0xc732bac
cpuid = 1; apic id = 01
panic: double fault
cpuid = 1
KDB: enter: panic
[thread pid 11 tid 100004]
Stopped at kdb_aenter+0x3a: mov [$0, kdb_why]

What additional info I must attach?
Now this machine is waiting for input for 'db>'

How-To-Repeat: I'm don't restart paniced machine/ So I'm not sure that can repeat this panic.
